records.problem_summary: Jenkins pipeline timeouts after maintenance window
records.resolution: Data Platform fixed network ACLs applied during maintenance; Jenkins jobs restored within 24h; Tableau refresh resumed after pipeline recovery
records.notes: Network ACL changes during IT maintenance blocked Jenkins agents from data sources

records.problem_summary: Tableau stale dashboards after upstream pipeline failure
records.resolution: Resolved automatically once Jenkins pipeline jobs completed successfully
records.notes: Downstream impact — fix root cause in Jenkins first
